821.reason: [This loop never advances the token counter when encountering RBRACE, causing infinite loop or missing end of block detection. The function should consume tokens and handle empty blocks properly.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This loop never advances the token counter when encountering RBRACE, causing infinite loop or missing end of block detection. The function should consume tokens and handle empty blocks properly.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [This loop can become infinite because token_cnt is not advanced when the current token is RBRACE, and if no Decl or Stmt consumes tokens properly, the condition never changes]

793.reason: [BlockItem() only processes one item instead of looping to handle all BlockItems until '}', violating the grammar rule Block → '{' { BlockItem } '}']

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [BlockItem() only processes one item instead of looping to handle all BlockItems until '}', violating the grammar rule Block → '{' { BlockItem } '}']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [BlockItem should be called in a loop to handle multiple BlockItems until '}' is encountered, but currently it's only called once]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [This only processes one BlockItem, but the grammar requires zero or more BlockItems in a loop until '}' is encountered]
